There’s a reason we continue to dominate the financial consulting and controllership industry: whether you’re a mom + pop shop or a 7-figure agency, we’re committed to building our relationships as robust as our portfolios. ## Financial Services For ### What We Bring To The Table managing ## $24M in payments for our clients a year. Combining ## Over 100 years of combined experience on the team Analyzed ## Over 16,000 Financials Over 4 years Smal| ## Our dedicated team of financial experts is here to analyze, optimize and maximize profit margins for businesses local to Tucson and Phoenix, AZ and virtually across the US ### More Money, Less Paperwork [](https://modventuresllc.com/tax-services)[](https://modventuresllc.com/client-advisory-services)[](https://modventuresllc.com/virtual-cfo-services)[](https://modventuresllc.com/virtual-cfo-services)### [**Outsourced CFO Services**](https://modventuresllc.com/virtual-cfo-services)[](https://modventuresllc.com/client-advisory-services)### [**Client Accounting + Advisory Services**](https://modventuresllc.com/client-advisory-services)[](https://modventuresllc.com/tax-services)### [**Business Tax Preparation**](https://modventuresllc.com/tax-services) With two decades of experience and a passion for empowering others to take control of their finances, Gabrielle has established herself as a visionary in revolutionizing the world of accounting. As a wife and busy mother of two, Gabrielle founded MOD VENTURES LLC in her living room in 2004. Her mission is to not only help her clients’ businesses grow, but to also change the way they see their big-picture vision – and how their day-to-day business operations will get them there. Although born of humble roots indeed, Gabrielle’s passion, vision and zeal in helping thousands of clients achieve financial success are what have grown MOD VENTURES LLC into the seven-figure firm it is today. Meet Our Founder + CEO ## _Gabrielle Luoma (CPA, CGMA) _ [](https://modventuresllc.com/about-us)[About the the Team](https://modventuresllc.com/about-us) MOD VENTURES LLC has been wonderful to work with from setting up my business, to taking care of my monthly accounting & sales tax. Everyone I've interacted with was not only kind, but extremely informative. Thank you for all that you do to keep my business compliant & stress free. Becca De La Plants ## Latest On The Blog [![A woman with glasses and long dark hair smiles with arms crossed next to text about seniority and leadership in finance teams.](https://modventuresllc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/MOD_Blog-WhySeniorityDoesntEqualLeadership_1046x936.jpg)](https://modventuresllc.com/senior-cpa-vs-cfo-why-seniority-doesnt-equal-leadership/ "Senior CPA vs CFO: Why Seniority Doesn’t Equal Leadership")[![A man in a suit and a woman in business attire stand back to back, smiling, with a banner reading “CPA vs Fractional CFO: Different Roles, Different Outcomes.”.](https://modventuresllc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/MOD_Blog-CPAvsFractionalCFO_1046x936.jpg)](https://modventuresllc.com/cpa-vs-fractional-cfo-different-roles-different-outcomes/ "CPA vs Fractional CFO: Different Roles, Different Outcomes") ## Should you outsource controllership? ### It’s no secret that managing your company’s financial performance accurately and on time is critical to its success, no matter how big or small the company is. Outsourced controller services can be invaluable when your day-to-day operations become too complex for a bookkeeper alone. You need specialized insight on your company’s financial performance and changing needs to make effective decisions if you want to sustain your growth for the long haul. Hiring an in-house controller can be expensive and inefficient. There’s training and vacation time to think about, as well as their (often large) salary, incentives and benefits packages. And often, they only bring one area of expertise to the table. When you outsource your financial controllership to a specialized accounting firm like MOD VENTURES LLC, you have a dedicated team of financial experts in your corner ready to support your changing needs as your business grows. WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • WE’RE INVESTED IN OUR CLIENTS • ![](https://static.showit.co/1600/TEbCMPZ5TyOEmgVmVPtJow/shared/mod-ventures-outsourced-accounting-financial-services-9.jpg) Our comprehensive onboarding process ensures you’ll be matched with the best financial controller for your business needs. Together, we examine where your company’s at, where it could be, and what you need to get it there. We personalize all of our financial services to be everything you need and nothing you don’t, leveraging the collective knowledge of our dedicated team with secure and seamless accounting software. ### Work With Us [](https://modventuresllc.com/contact-us)### [Work With Us](https://modventuresllc.com/contact-us) CLOSE * We will never share your details with any third party ## Get A Free Financial Check Up Assess Your Business Finances and Make Smarter Decisions ## Thank you!
